mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shipment_orders ( shipment_order_id, po_id, shipment_issue_date, client_id, manager_id, shipment_status, shipment_due_date, shipment_client_name, shipment_country, shipment_manager_name, shipment_item_name, shipment_linked_documents ) SELECT #{shipmentOrderId}, po_id, CURRENT_DATE, client_id, manager_id, '출하준비', po_delivery_date, po_client_name, po_country, po_manager_name, '', CONCAT('[{"id":"', po_id, '","type":"PO","status":"', po_status, '"}]') FROM purchase_orders WHERE po_id = #{poId}
